title: Zygopetalum venustum
taxonomy: Zygopetalum venustum is a genus of orchids, and more specifically, it belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This genus is part of the subtribe Maxillariinae. Within the subtribe Maxillariinae, Zygopetalum venustum is classified as being in the tribe Cranichideae. The exact classification of Zygopetalum venustum also includes its family rank as being in the order Asparagales. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects that may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
